movie.actors: David Duchovny, Gillian Anderson, Amanda Peet, Billy Connolly
movie.plot: Mulder and Scully are called back to duty by the FBI when a former priest claims to be receiving psychic visions pertaining to a kidnapped agent.
movie.title: The X Files: I Want to Believe
movie.writer: Frank Spotnitz, Chris Carter, Chris Carter (television series "The X-Files")
